title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Crompton Greaves Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Crompton Greaves Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Crompton Greaves Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Crompton Greaves Advisory Limited:
Crompton Greaves Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crompton Greaves Advisory Limited!
